text.title: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization Principles
text.summary: Multi-platform search landscape, GEO vs traditional SEO distinction, and core citation optimization principles.

rule.statement: Optimize for AI engine citation in addition to Google rank — treat them as separate but complementary signals.
rule.rationale: ChatGPT and Perplexity handle 400M+ weekly queries combined. Semrush projects LLM traffic to overtake traditional Google search by end of 2027. Content invisible to AI engines loses share regardless of Google rank.

list.item: Google: 90% market share, 30% of queries now trigger AI Overviews
ChatGPT/Perplexity: 400M+ weekly users, citation-based results
YouTube: second-largest search engine, video SEO rules apply
TikTok: primary search for Gen Z, short-form video format
Amazon: product search, A9 algorithm, voice commerce ($80B by 2026)

rule.statement: GEO targets being the source AI engines cite, not just the link at position 1-10 in results.
rule.rationale: Traditional SEO optimizes for ranked links. GEO optimizes for inclusion in AI-generated answers. These are different mechanisms: citations are based on authority, entity clarity, and content extractability.

list.item: Traditional SEO: rank in positions 1-10 for a keyword
GEO: get cited, referenced, or recommended in AI-generated answers
Topic targeting over keyword targeting (broader subject authority)
Brand visibility and mentions over position rankings
Structured, extractable content over flowing prose

rule.statement: Update content within 30 days — fresh content receives 3.2x more AI citations than stale content (Semrush research).
rule.rationale: AI engines weight recency as an authority signal. Content that has not been updated signals potential staleness, reducing citation probability regardless of original quality.

list.item: Become an authoritative source: earn citations, backlinks, and earned media
Provide clear, structured information with direct answers
Use schema markup for machine readability
Create comprehensive, well-researched original content
Build consensus across owned and earned media
Focus on original insights, frameworks, and proprietary data
Build entity consistency: same brand name, product names, author names everywhere

section.title: GEO Metrics

list.item: AI Visibility Score: frequency of brand appearance in AI responses
Source Citations: times AI models reference or link to content
AI Share of Voice: % of relevant AI answers mentioning the brand
Time-to-Citation: days from publishing to first AI citation

section.note: AI citation tracking requires paid tools (Otterly.AI, Profound, Semrush AI Visibility Toolkit). No free API tier exists for monitoring. Set up Google Alerts for brand mentions as a low-cost proxy.
